name: Orum
description: Bank payment API for instant ACH, RTP, and FedNow payouts with deterministic rail routing.

seo.title: Orum — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Orum: Bank payment API for instant ACH, RTP, and FedNow payouts with deterministic rail routing.

when_to_use: Instant ACH payouts for gig economy worker earnings
FedNow and RTP rail selection for deterministic instant payouts
Same-day ACH disbursements for insurance claim settlements
Automating bank payment routing logic by amount and priority

pros: Instant US bank payouts via single API
Strong for payroll and marketplace disbursement
cons: Not a checkout gateway, payouts only
review.verdict: Best-in-class for US instant payouts with deterministic routing, but US-only scope is a real ceiling.
review.best_for: US marketplaces and payroll platforms needing instant ACH/RTP/FedNow routing
review.not_for: Merchants needing checkout acceptance or non-US payment rails

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
